sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ الطُّلَّابُ فِي مَنْزِلِ جَمَالٍ لِلْمُذَاكَرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti su se skupili u Džemalovoj kući za učenje.
sentences.translationEn: The students gathered at Jamal's house to study.
They divided the lessons among themselves.

sentences.translation: Svako je objasnio svoj dio drugima.
sentences.translationEn: Each one explained their part to the others.

sentences.translation: Završili su s učenjem i osjećali se sigurno.
sentences.translationEn: They finished studying and felt confident.

sentences.arabic: الدِّرَاسَةُ الجَمَاعِيَّةُ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الدِّرَاسَةِ الفَرْدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Grupno učenje je bolje od individualnog učenja.
sentences.translationEn: Group studying is better than studying alone.
